name: vivijure-studio
description: Vivijure studio core: a module host for AI film production. A thin Cloudflare Worker that owns project / storyboard / cast / render orchestration and a module registry; every capability beyond that is an opt-in module worker plugged in through a typed hook contract.

scripts.bootstrap: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(fs.existsSync('wrangler.toml')){console.error('wrangler.toml already exists; not overwriting.');process.exit(1)}fs.copyFileSync('wrangler.example.toml','wrangler.toml');console.log('Created wrangler.toml from wrangler.example.toml.')"
